children.summary:
Source asset: reports/breakwave/pdfs/2024-05-04_t73qz6pfuu0gb2ohbflvl5kcym5v55_breakwavedryapril302024report_4e58edc6b5bd.pdf

[Page 1]
BDRY
Dry Bulk Shipping
April 30, 2024
Breakwave Dry Futures Index: 2,018 Baltic Dry Index (spot): 1,684 Short-term Indicators:
↓ 30D: -6.8% ↓ 30D: -7.5% Momentum: Neutral
↑ YTD: 37.3% ↓ YTD: -17.8% Sentiment: Positive
↑ YOY: 15.2% ↑ YOY: 9.2% Fundamentals: Neutral
Bi-Weekly Report
• Spot Dry Bulk Rates Continue to Underperform Although Expectations Remain High - The month of April proved to
be a disappointment for freight futures traders as earlier expectations for a rebound in rates failed to materialize. In
fact, the average spot Capesize rate for the month ended up being some 40% lower than what was anticipated just a
month prior, reflecting the significant optimism in the dry bulk industry on the future progression of dry bulk rates.
